first_run.rationale: The scores are identical (4/10), and the reasoning is substantively the same across both evaluations. Both versions praise the candidate's geospatial and low-latency systems experience while raising the exact same core concern: a lack of recent modern C++ or Rust experience. The minor variations in phrasing are consistent with normal run-to-run noise and do not introduce any new logic or concerns tied to the change in job locations from various global cities to Kenya.
